前線基地近郊の森の中。<br>シラエスと<user>が基地へと歩みを進めていた。:
In the forest near the forward base,
Shiraes and %user% were making their way back.
調査に付き合ってもらって助かったよ。<br>妙な植物の多い場所だったから、シラエ:
Thanks for coming along for the survey.
There were so many unusual plants — I was relying on your knowledge.
これでも長く森の中で生きていたからな。<br>植物のことなら少しは詳しいつもりだ:
I did live in the forest for a long time, after all.
I like to think I know plants reasonably well.
少し、どころじゃなかったぞ。<br>俺には雑草にしか見えない草のことも、全部知っ:
'Reasonably' is an understatement.
You knew every plant that just looked like weeds to me.
雑草などという草はない。<br>世界の見え方は知識で変わるものだよ……:
There are no such things as weeds.
Knowledge changes how you see the world...
反射的に止まろうとしたが間に合わず、<br>足元で妙な形をした草がぐちゃりと潰れ:
He tried to stop on reflex but was too late — a strangely shaped plant
at his feet was crushed, spraying a cloudy liquid.
避けようとしたが、液体が身体の一部に付着してしまう。<br>すぐに拭き取ったもの:
He tried to dodge but some got on him.
He wiped it off immediately, but a strange heat lingered on his skin.
間に合わなかったか……。<br>その類の植物は、強い衝撃を受けると毒性のある液体:
Didn't make it in time... That type of plant releases
a toxic liquid when struck hard.
知ってるならもっと早く――って、エルフに言っても仕方ないか。<br>むしろ踏む直:
If you knew, a faster warning would be nice — but, well, elf.
Still, nearly stopping me at the last second — that's Shiraes.
で、この液体はどういう毒なんだ。<br>まさかとは思うが、俺は死ぬのか？:
So what kind of toxin is this liquid?
Don't tell me — am I going to die?
いや。ただ、その液体は強い催淫作用があってね。<br>性欲を発散せずにいると大変:
No. However, that liquid has a strong aphrodisiac effect.
If you don't release the urge, things will get difficult.
さ、催淫作用！？ <br>なんでそんな草がこんな場所に……！:
An-an aphrodisiac!?
Why would a plant like that be here...!
心配はない。<br>性欲の発散は、私ですませればいいからな。:
No need to worry.
I can take care of the release for you.
いや、シラエスを物みたいに使うのは、さすがに……: No, using Shiraes like some kind of tool is... a bit much...
短く思考を巡らせたシラエスは、<br>ふわりと全身に魔法をかける。:
Shiraes paused briefly in thought,
then cast a gentle spell over herself.
衣服をそっとずらし、シラエスが<user>を誘う。<br>すでに催淫効果がまわっ:
Shifting her clothing aside, Shiraes invited %user% in.
The aphrodisiac had already taken hold — there was no resisting——
